news-global-econ.title: Texas Rangers get the nod over Cleveland Guardians in tonight's MLB betting pick despite road struggles
news-global-econ.description: Jacob deGrom and the Texas Rangers face Tanner Bibee and the Cleveland Guardians in a matchup of solid starters with recent head-to-head history.

news-global-econ.title: Amazon Prime Video NFL analyst defends streaming services broadcasting but understands fan frustration
news-global-econ.description: Andrew Whitworth said NFL streaming frustrations mirror the challenge of finding shows across multiple platforms in today's fragmented media landscape.

news-global-econ.title: Trump admin backs Bolivia state of emergency as leftist ex-leader's loyalists fracture nation
news-global-econ.description: Bolivia's pro-US government declares a state of emergency after 50 days of blockades led by former socialist president Evo Morales and his supporters.

news-global-econ.title: Shock poll: Talarico ties Paxton in Texas Senate race, threatening GOP stronghold
news-global-econ.description: James Talarico and Ken Paxton are tied at 47% among likely voters in Texas, according to a new poll, as Democrats eye their first Senate win in decades.

news-global-econ.title: GOP congressman reveals mystery illness that sidelined him from Congress for nearly four months
news-global-econ.description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. revealed the medical condition that kept him away from the House for nearly four months in an emotional speech on the floor.

news-global-soc.title: Air Force reveals B-2's hidden ship killer capability as China threat grows
news-global-soc.description: The announcement comes as the Pentagon increasingly focuses on preparing for a potential conflict in the Indo-Pacific, where China's rapidly expanding navy would present one of the U.S. military's biggest challenges.

news-global-soc.title: SCOTUS to Weigh Whether AR-15s Protected by 2nd, 14th Amendments
news-global-soc.description:
On Tuesday, SCOTUS agreed to hear Grant v. Higgins, a case centering on whether AR-15s are protected by the Second and Fourteenth Amendments. 
The post SCOTUS to Weigh Whether AR-15s Protected by 2nd, 14th Amendments appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: ACC CEO Chris Jahn on Permitting Reform: America Permitted and Built Empire State Building in Two Years
news-global-soc.description:
American Chemistry Council (ACC) President and CEO Chris Jahn said at the Council's first policy summit on Thursday that there is a dire need to enact permitting reform, noting that the Empire State Building was permitted and built in only two years.

news-global-soc.title: Supreme Court financial disclosures reveal concert tickets from Bad Bunny's label, millions in book payments
news-global-soc.description: Justice Sonia Sotomayor reported receiving concert tickets worth $4,333 during a Puerto Rico trip, according to Supreme Court financial disclosures.
